song.title: 紙飛行機
song.artist: Demo Artist (invented, not a real song)
song.notes: An invented demo song about a paper airplane thrown from a rooftop, standing in for hope let loose without knowing where it lands.

lines.text: 屋上から紙飛行機を飛ばした
lines.reading: おくじょうからかみひこうきをとばした
lines.furi: 屋上[おくじょう]から紙飛行機[かみひこうき]を飛[と]ばした
lines.literal: From the rooftop, paper airplane threw
lines.natural: I threw a paper airplane from the rooftop
lines.contextual: Letting go of something small and fragile, just to see where it goes
lines.grammar_note: から marks the starting point of motion; を marks the direct object being thrown

words.context_meaning: the highest point, where you can finally let something go

words.furi: 紙飛行機[かみひこうき]
words.context_meaning: a small hope, folded by hand, sent out with no guarantee
to release something and let it find its own way

lines.text: 風に乗ってどこまでも行け
lines.reading: かぜにのってどこまでもいけ
lines.furi: 風[かぜ]に乗[の]ってどこまでも行[い]け
lines.literal: Wind on ride, to anywhere go
lines.natural: Ride the wind and go as far as you can
lines.contextual: A wish thrown after it, since you can't follow it yourself

words.context_meaning: the only thing that can carry your hope further than you can
to trust something bigger than yourself to carry you

lines.reading: もどらなくていいから
lines.furi: 戻[もど]らなくていいから
lines.natural: You don't need to come back
lines.contextual: Releasing it fully, without wanting it returned
lines.grammar_note: なくていい expresses permission not to do something

words.context_meaning: letting go without expecting anything back

lines.text: 屋上から紙飛行機を飛ばした
lines.reading: おくじょうからかみひこうきをとばした
lines.furi: 屋上[おくじょう]から紙飛行機[かみひこうき]を飛[と]ばした
lines.literal: From the rooftop, paper airplane threw
lines.natural: I threw a paper airplane from the rooftop
lines.contextual: The same small act of hope, repeated because once wasn't enough

words.context_meaning: the highest point, where you can finally let something go

words.furi: 紙飛行機[かみひこうき]
words.context_meaning: a small hope, folded by hand, sent out with no guarantee
to release something and let it find its own way
